title: Little Rascals Varieties
writer: Gordon Douglas, Robert A. McGowan, Hal Roach
actors: George 'Spanky' McFarland, Darla Hood, Carl 'Alfalfa' Switzer
plot: A compilation feature-film made up of four 'Our Gang" shorts from the 1930s. The shorts used in this 1959 feature release were Our Gang Follies of 1936 (1935), The Pinch Singer (1936), Reunion in Rhythm (1937), and Our Gang Follie...
